data.description: Elis: Company disclosed own share trading April 20-24, 2026.

data.title: Notice on convening the annual general meeting of Aktsiaselts Ekspress Grupp
data.description: Aktsiaselts Ekspress Grupp (registry code 10004677) Management Board has announced the annual general meeting of shareholders scheduled for 1 June 2026 at 10:00 at Narva mnt 13, 10151 Tallinn. The meeting will take place on the 4th floor, with participant registration starting at 9:30.

data.title: STMicroelectronics brings always-on vision to next-generation personal electronics with new ultralow-power image sensors
data.description: STMicroelectronics is introducing new ultralow-power image sensors for next-generation personal electronics, enabling always-on vision capabilities. These sensors offer remarkable energy efficiency, consuming as little as 20µA per frame, which is significantly lower than current market standards. This advancement allows electronic devices to capture and process images continuously while consuming minimal power. Additionally, the sensors provide high-quality imaging performance with resolution ranging from 400x400 to 1600x1200 pixels. This innovation signifies a major leap in enhancing the functionality and efficiency of personal electronic devices, promising a new era of always-on vision technology.

data.title: Results of Updated Mineral Resource and Reserves; Increases Consolidated M&I to 731koz Au and Inferred Resource to 653koz Au
data.description: The latest mineral resource and reserves update shows a significant increase, with Consolidated Measured and Indicated (M&I) resources now totaling 731,000 ounces of gold (Au) and Inferred resources amounting to 653,000 ounces of gold (Au).

data.title: Swedish pureSignal expands across Europe with new distributor partnership in Iceland
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in GÖTEBORG, Sweden, pureSignal, a technology company from Sweden, announced its ongoing European expansion through a partnership with Icelandic distributor HD Industrial & Technical Services. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to bolster their presence in the region.

data.title: MIMARU Introduces First-time-friendly Sumo Dining Experience at Sumo Live Restaurant in Tokyo
data.description: In Tokyo on April 28, 2026, MIMARU, a prominent apartment hotel brand in Japan catering to families, and managed by Cosmos Hotel Management Co., Ltd., has launched an innovative experience for guests to immerse themselves in a highly revered cultural practice of Japan. The initiative, titled THE SUMO LIVE RESTAURANT HIRAKUZA GINZA, offers a unique opportunity for guests to engage with one of Japan's most iconic traditions.

data.title: Loftie Launches Loftie+ Habit System to Help People Put Their Phones Down
data.description: Today in London, Loftie introduced Loftie+, a revolutionary behavior-change system aimed at transforming habits rather than monitoring data. This launch comes from the maker of the acclaimed alarm clock that serves as an alternative to keeping smartphones on nightstands. Recent studies indicate that more than 50% of adults in the UK and Ireland tend to stay awake past their intended bedtime. This innovative approach by Loftie aims to address this concerning trend and promote healthier sleeping habits among the population.

data.title: Market Logic extends DeepSights Personas with synthetic panels and flexible persona generation to redefine audience research at scale
data.description: DeepSights Personas has introduced groundbreaking features with its Persona Builder and Synthetic Panel, revolutionizing the speed at which insights, innovation, and marketing teams can enhance audience comprehension using the most up-to-date data for quicker, data-driven decision-making. This development was announced in Berlin on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Ondo Finance Brings Shareholder Voting Capabilities to Tokenized Securities with Broadridge
data.description: In a recent development, Ondo Finance has forged a partnership with Broadridge to facilitate tokenized stock and ETF holders in engaging in proxy voting. This collaboration also aims to grant access to regulatory filings and communications related to the underlying securities. The initiative, established in New York on April 28, 2026, showcases the commitment of Ondo and Broadridge to incorporate blockchain technology for seamless participation in corporate governance. This joint effort seeks to empower holders of tokenized assets by providing transparency and opportunity in the decision-making process.
Åland Bank reports Q1 2026 results in latest interim report.
Zealand Pharma's new dual agonist, survodutide, led to 16.6% weight loss and improved metabolism in Phase 3 trial.

data.title: Scancell receives FDA Fast Track Designation for iSCIB1+ in advanced melanoma and provides data update from its SCOPE Phase 2 study
data.description: A Phase 2 trial known as SCOPE showed that iSCIB1+, when used along with ipilimumab and nivolumab, produced impressive results. Specifically, there was a 77% progression-free survival rate at the 20-month mark. The trial indicated potent and long-lasting efficacy for this combination treatment. Additional data on progression-free survival and early overall survival is set to be released in the first half of 2027.
The most active Shanghai wire rod contract rose more than 4% to 3,396 yuan per metric ton.
The CEO of Novartis said the anti-allergy drug Rhapsido will not be completely covered by the MFN pricing policy.
Novartis’s CEO said the priority is an early rollout of Rhapsido in Germany and Japan, according to a media call.

data.title: Guangdong Goods Go Global: Zhongshan Products in Malaysia Event Makes Its Debut Abroad
data.description: This past weekend in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, over 70 manufacturers from Zhongshan showcased consumer goods and smart-manufacturing products as a part of Guangdong’s “Goods Go Global” trade promotion program. The event, the first overseas edition of the program, took place at Pavilion Bukit Jalil and included a business conference along with an offline product exhibition. The goal was to assist companies from Zhongshan in increasing their footprint in Southeast Asian markets. The event aimed at facilitating business expansion saw a good turnout and enthusiasm from both the participants and visitors.

data.title: Boliden's Q1 2026: Solid performance despite abnormal seismic activity in Garpenberg
data.description: On April 28, 2026, the President and CEO, Mikael Staffas, emphasized the significance of concentrating on what can be influenced amid challenging times. He highlighted the organization's commitment to this approach. The financial report indicated a revenue of SEK 27,822 million compared to the previous figure of SEK 21,121 million. data.title: Interim report January - March 2026 Sweco AB (publ)
data.description: Sweco, a company listed on NASDAQ with the symbol SWEC-B, announced a successful first quarter in 2026 with positive organic growth and increased fees. They also reported a higher billing ratio and ongoing acquisitions. Net sales rose to SEK 8.3 billion during this period. The EBITA stood at SEK 869 million for the same quarter.
The Philippine currency slid to an all-time low of 61.047 per dollar.
